.monaco-workbench.background: radial-gradient(1000px 600px at 50% -10%, rgba(140,120,255,0.10), transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(8,8,12,0.5), rgba(8,8,12,0.64)), url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center center / cover no-repeat, #08080c !important

.tab.active.box-shadow: inset 0 3px 0 rgba(var(--islands-accent-iris),0.95), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), inset 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.12), inset -1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1), 0 0 18px -2px rgba(var(--islands-accent-iris),0.5) !important

.part.activitybar .action-item .action-l.transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) !important

.notebookOverlay.clip-path: inset(0 18px var(--islands-panel-gap) var(--islands-panel-gap) round 0 0 var(--islands-panel-radius) var(--islands-panel-radius)) !important
